summary: First iteration testing of TOP LOTTO PWA. Backend 27/27 pytest tests passed covering auth, lotteries, users, agencies, tickets, results, payout calculation (verified bòlèt straight 10 HTG @ position 1 -> 600 HTG payout), pay flow, dashboard stats, reports CSV, settings, and authorization (machann 403, anon 401). Frontend playwright run validated login -> dashboard (6 stat cards + trend chart + recent tickets/results), Sales POS (lottery select, game/playtype, cart total update, sell creates ticket with print modal showing TL26061200002 + barcode + i18n footer 'Mèsi pou konfyans ou'), Verify/Results/Admin pages render, add-user dialog opens, FR<->HT language switch and HTG<->BRL currency switch both work.

issues: Radix Dialog console warnings: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' and missing aria-describedby. Accessibility only, non-blocking. Wrap a hidden DialogTitle (VisuallyHidden) in TicketPrint.jsx and Admin dialogs.

action_items: Optional A11y polish: add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle in TicketPrint.jsx (and any other dialogs without titles) to silence Radix dialog accessibility warnings.
Consider adding more dashboard data-testid attributes on individual stat cards (currently only dashboard-page is testid) for finer-grained future testing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: dashboard_stats trend uses created_at string comparison with mixed Z/ISO timestamps which can be fragile across timezones; consider storing draw_date or using a date index. Currently works because all data is recent UTC.

server.py compute_payout: rate type-cast is fine, but check_win short-circuits at first matching index; for play_type 'straight_box' it returns 'straight' if num == winning at idx, otherwise checks 'box' — works correctly but mixed-mode wins on different positions only consider position of first hit.
server.py: cancel_ticket does not refund/reset payout_amount; if ticket was paid then cancelled, accounting will drift. Add a guard preventing cancellation of paid tickets or process a reversal.
Frontend Sales page: number-input has no max-length validation per game (bolet=2, pick3=3 etc.) — could allow invalid numbers to reach backend.
Backend: pay_ticket allows role 'machann' to pay any ticket; consider restricting machann to own tickets only (matches list_tickets scoping).
seed_data_creation: Tests created a TEST_ machann user, a TEST_ agency, and one ticket TLYYMMDD##### with a winning bolet result for lottery_id index 0 on today's date. Settings restored to defaults after update test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_toplotto_api.py is full regression suite (auth, users, agencies, tickets, results, payouts, dashboard, reports, settings, authorization). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend critical flows confirmed via playwright (login, dashboard, sales -> sell -> print modal, verify/results/admin pages, lang/currency switches). Pay flow validated end-to-end: bòlèt straight 10 HTG @ position 1 -> 600 HTG payout (60x straight rate * 1.0 position multiplier).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no blocking issues observed. Only console-level a11y warnings on Radix Dialog (missing DialogTitle/DialogDescription).
